subject: FW: COUQ contribution - Mr Epstein
body:
fyi

 

Rich Kahn

457 Madison Avenue

4th Floor

New York, NY 10022

tel  212-891-6430

fax 212-750-2408

 

From: Kristin Andersen [mailto:kandersen@kirkland.com] 
Sent: Friday, November 09, 2007 3:25 PM
To: Rich Kahn
Subject: re: COUQ contribution - Mr Epstein

 


Hi Rich, 

Here's a copy of the check.   



Let me know if you need anything else. 

Kristin
_______________________________________________________________ 
Kristin Andersen | Assistant to Jay Lefkowitz | Kirkland & Ellis LLP
153 EAST 53rd STREET, NEW YORK, NY  10022 | P 212-909-3002 | F
212-446-4900
KAndersen@Kirkland.com





"Rich Kahn" <rkahn@nysgmail.com> 

11/07/2007 10:16 AM 

To

<kandersen@kirkland.com> 

cc

	
Subject

re: COUQ contribution - Mr Epstein

 

		




I was wondering if you had decided which charity Jay has chosen. 
Thank you 
  
Rich Kahn 
457 Madison Avenue 
4th Floor 
New York, NY 10022 
tel  212-891-6430 
fax 212-750-2408
